summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Back-office and Reviews & Ratings features. All 33 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend admin dashboard and map page review integration working correctly with real API data.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/stats - Returns platform statistics (users, partners, reviews, flags)
POST /api/admin/seed - With auth promotes user to admin
POST /api/reviews/{id}/helpful - Mark as helpful with auth
Admin dashboard loads at /admin with real API data
Stats cards display: Total Users (14), Pending Verifications (1), Total Revenue (0 MAD), Total Reviews (5)
All 4 tabs present: Overview, Partner Verification, Content Moderation, Users
Partner Verification tab shows pending partners from API (1 pending)
Partner details panel shows Business Info, Contact Info, Languages
Approve & Verify and Reject buttons present and functional
Content Moderation tab shows flags from API (2 pending)
Resolve buttons present for each flag
Recent Activity section shows partner approvals/rejections
Landmark detail panel opens on click
ReviewSection component integrated in landmark detail
Review cards display with rating, user name, date, content
Review/AggregateRating schema present with proper structure
critical_code_review_comments: All admin endpoints properly protected with role-based access control (401 for no auth, 403 for non-admin)
Reviews system properly prevents duplicate reviews per user per target
Content flags created when reviews are flagged, visible in admin moderation
Admin activity log tracks all partner approvals/rejections and flag resolutions
Frontend admin dashboard properly fetches and displays real API data

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all admin dashboard and map page features working)

seed_data_creation: Test partners and reviews created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin back-office and Reviews & Ratings features fully tested and working. Admin dashboard at /admin requires login with admin user (phase1test@example.com). There is 1 pending partner (Test Riad), 2 content flags, and 5 total reviews in the database. The ReviewSection component is integrated in MapPage landmark detail panel. All admin endpoints require admin role (403 for regular users). Schema.org JSON-LD with Review/AggregateRating is present in index.html.
